scripts.dev:minigame: pnpm --filter @digivice/game sync-assets && VITE_INITIAL_SCENE=flappy_bird_game NATIVE_FEATURE_DEBUG_MODE=true APP_LOGO_TEXT=DEBUG vite --host
scripts.build: pnpm --dir ../.. run sync:versions && pnpm --filter @digivice/game sync-assets && tsc -b && NODE_ENV=development vite build
scripts.build:development: pnpm --dir ../.. run sync:versions && pnpm --filter @digivice/game sync-assets && tsc -b && NODE_ENV=development vite build
scripts.build:production: pnpm --dir ../.. run sync:versions && pnpm --filter @digivice/game sync-assets && tsc -b && NODE_ENV=production vite build --mode production
scripts.build:production:debug: pnpm --dir ../.. run sync:versions && pnpm --filter @digivice/game sync-assets && tsc -b && NODE_ENV=production NATIVE_FEATURE_DEBUG_MODE=true APP_LOGO_TEXT=DEBUG vite build --mode production
